rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KING FOO TAM
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to may 7, 2019. new notice of the first amendment must be mailed as the POS shows notice mailed MAY 31, 2019, which is not possible. however, notice is insufficient even if the POS meant to say March 31, 2019, as the first amendment was not filed until 4/5/19. See LRSF 14.21.A. in addition, the first amendment lists only the assessor parcel number and address. the full legal description must be provided (full paragraph with description, such as "running along a line 50' from . . ."). new deadline for filing in order to avoid another automatic continuance is noon on wednesday, may 1, 2019.
